title: Kaizen PDCA Cycle State
description: Tracks the state of a Plan-Do-Check-Act improvement cycle with tetravalent logic integration

id.description: Unique identifier for this PDCA cycle (e.g., pdca-reduce-log-verbosity)

proposition.description: What improvement is being tested (e.g., 'Reducing log verbosity will improve response time by 10%')

model.description: Which Kaizen model this improvement falls under

phase.description: Current phase of the PDCA cycle

success_criteria.description: What constitutes improvement (e.g., 'response time decreases by at least 10%')

belief_state.description: Tetravalent belief state for the improvement proposition — reuses the existing tetravalent-state.schema.json structure

iterations.description: Count of PDCA iterations completed (max 3 before human review)

question.description: The 'Why' question asked at this level

answer.description: The causal explanation at this level

belief_state.description: Tetravalent belief state for this causal claim

five_whys.description: Optional root cause analysis levels — each level is a belief state

waste_category.description: Optional — which waste category this cycle addresses

evaluated_by.description: Agent or persona managing this cycle
